title: Terms of Service
description: These terms describe the basic conditions for using this Kilordle site.

sections.title: Use Of The Site
paragraphs: This site is provided as a browser-based word puzzle experience. You may use it for personal entertainment and casual play.
Do not misuse the site, interfere with its operation, or attempt to disrupt access for other users.

sections.title: No Warranty
paragraphs: The site is provided as is. Gameplay, availability, content, and external services may change or stop working without notice.

sections.title: External Links
paragraphs: The site may link to external resources such as the original GitHub project. External sites are controlled by their own operators.
